basic_details.short_information: Broadcast Engineering Consultants India Limited (BECIL) has published the Manager/Admin Notification 2026 on 09.05.2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Manager/Admin position. Candidates within the age range of up to 50 years and holding a Graduate degree from a recognized University with 15 years of experience in office administration, MIS report preparation for manpower planning, and working knowledge of SAP/ERP are eligible to apply online at BECIL Official Website. The application process will be active from 09-05-2026 to 15-05-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from Recognized University, 15 years experience in office administration, MIS Reports preparation for Manpower Planning, Working knowledge of SAP/ERP
qualification.details: Manager/Admin: Graduate from Recognized University. 15 years in the field of office administration, MIS Reports preparation for Manpower Planning. Working knowledge on SAP/ERP is essential. Candidates who have worked with DMRC/Metro Rail Company for 5 years directly or through its Contractors in the past and are abreast with the working of Metro Rail HR/Admin matters will be preferred.

salary_details.details: Rs. 96,600/- Per Month (Statutory deduction as per rule)

selection_process: Shortlisting Interaction/Assessment/Skill test (if any) Interview by client
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BECIL Manager/Admin Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BECIL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BECIL Manager/Admin recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the BECIL Manager/Admin posts is 15th May 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Manager/Admin post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates from a recognized university with 15 years of experience in office administration and MIS Reports preparation for Manpower Planning. Working knowledge of SAP/ERP is also essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Manager/Admin post is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Manager/Admin position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 96,600/- per month, subject to statutory deductions as per rules.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Manager/Admin post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Manager/Admin post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 295/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST category candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the BECIL Manager/Admin recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates, followed by an interaction/assessment/skill test (if any), and finally an interview by the client.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the BECIL Manager/Admin recruitment must be submitted online through the official BECIL website.

faq.question: Q10. Does BECIL offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation details for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific information on age relaxation.
